blog-content-pipeline.name: Blog Content Pipeline
blog-content-pipeline.description: Research a topic, write a blog post, generate images, and prepare for publishing

roles.name: Researcher
roles.role: Deep-dive research on the topic using web sources

roles.name: Writer
roles.role: Write compelling long-form content from research

roles.name: Designer
roles.role: Generate hero images and illustrations

roles.name: Editor
roles.role: Review, polish and SEO-optimize the final piece

code-review-squad.name: Code Review Squad
code-review-squad.description: Analyze a codebase for bugs, security issues, and improvement opportunities

roles.name: Analyzer
roles.role: Parse codebase structure and identify patterns

roles.name: SecurityAuditor
roles.role: Scan for vulnerabilities and security anti-patterns

roles.name: Optimizer
roles.role: Identify performance bottlenecks and suggest improvements

roles.name: Reporter
roles.role: Compile findings into an actionable report

social-media-campaign.name: Social Media Campaign
social-media-campaign.description: Create a multi-platform social media campaign with visuals and copy

roles.name: Strategist
roles.role: Define campaign goals, audiences, and messaging

roles.name: Copywriter
roles.role: Write platform-specific copy (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram)

roles.name: VisualDesigner
roles.role: Generate campaign visuals and graphics

roles.name: Scheduler
roles.role: Create posting schedule and compile final campaign kit

competitive-analysis.name: Competitive Analysis
competitive-analysis.description: Research competitors, analyze their products, and compile a strategic report

roles.name: Scout
roles.role: Discover and catalog competitor products and features

roles.name: PricingAnalyst
roles.role: Compare pricing models and value propositions

roles.name: FeatureMapper
roles.role: Create feature comparison matrix

roles.name: Strategist
roles.role: Synthesize findings into actionable recommendations

checkpoints: Validate competitor list before deep analysis

email-outreach.name: Email Outreach Campaign
email-outreach.description: Research leads, craft personalized emails, and send via Resend

roles.name: LeadResearcher
roles.role: Find and qualify prospects from web sources

roles.name: Copywriter
roles.role: Craft personalized email sequences per lead segment

roles.name: Reviewer
roles.role: Review emails for tone, compliance, and personalization quality

roles.name: Sender
roles.role: Send approved emails via Resend API

documentation-generator.name: Documentation Generator
documentation-generator.description: Analyze a codebase and generate comprehensive documentation

roles.name: CodeScanner
roles.role: Parse project structure, exports, and dependencies

roles.name: APIDocWriter
roles.role: Generate API reference documentation from code

roles.name: GuideWriter
roles.role: Write getting started guides and tutorials

roles.name: Formatter
roles.role: Format and organize docs with table of contents and cross-links
